spec: Hologram OS — a shared (#k=) link lands the guest fullscreen in the running app with the share-to-run chrome (run · remix · share · save); a bare kiosk link stays clean (ADR-064, Phase 0)

results.name: frame document loads on a shared (#k=) link
the app mounts fullscreen on a shared link (no redirect to the World shell)
the share-to-run chrome renders over the app
chrome shows the app's VERIFIED content address (κ chip)
chrome carries the 'Made on Hologram' loop
a bare kiosk link (no #k=) stays chrome-free
the World shell Share emits the magic (#k=) link (modal · QR · Copy all carry it)
results.detail: no magic link in the share modal

results.name: that shared link lands the next guest in the chrome (the loop is closed)
a path-built link (?app=<folder>) resolves and lands in the chrome
the in-app Manage panel Share emits the magic (#k=) link too (aligned)
no fatal page errors
results.detail: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 504 () | Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 504 () | Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 504 ()
